zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Moels於1316年5月31日出生在英國薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利時，她的父親Sir John de Moels13歲，母親Lady Joan Lovel11歲。她於1337年8月30日之前與William de Botreaux在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年7月19日在英國多瑟特芒恩爾享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Moels于1316年5月31日出生在英国薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利时，她的父亲Sir John de Moels13岁，母亲Lady Joan Lovel11岁。她于1337年8月30日之前与William de Botreaux在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1349年7月19日在英国多瑟特芒恩爾享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moels
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Moll , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Catalan: habitational name from any of various minor places called Moles, from the plural of mola (see Mola ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulles (Calvados). See also   Moyles  .

variants.name: Moll
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the Middle English female personal name Moll(e), Mol, a common pet form of Maud (see Mould and Maude ).

English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English molle, mol(e), moul ‘mole’ (the burrowing animal), given perhaps to someone who wore moleskin, a mole catcher, or to someone with poor sight, or alternatively from Middle English mol ‘effeminate man’.
German: nickname from a dialect term for a plump, stout person. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Moels was born on 31 May 1316, in North Cadbury, Somerset, England, her father, Sir John de Moels, was 13 and her mother, Lady Joan Lovel, was 11. She married William de Botreaux before 30 August 1337, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 19 July 1349, in Marnhull, Dorset, England, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Moels est née le 31 mai 1316, à North Cadbury, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Moels, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Lovel, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé William de Botreaux avant 30 août 1337, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 juillet 1349, à Marnhull, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Moels am 31. Mai 1316 in North Cadbury, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Moels 13 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan Lovel 11. Sie hat vor 30. August 1337 in England William de Botreaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Juli 1349 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Marnhull, Dorset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Moels è nata il il 31 maggio 1316 nel North Cadbury, Somerset, England, sua padre, Sir John de Moels, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Lady Joan Lovel, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato William de Botreaux prima del 30 agosto 1337, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 luglio 1349, nel Marnhull, Dorset, England, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Moelsが1316年5月31日にイギリスソメルセトノース カドブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John de Moelsは13歳，母Lady Joan Lovelは11歳であった。1337年8月30日以前にイギリスでWilliam de Botreauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1349年7月19日にイギリスドールセトマルンハルで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Moels(이)가 1316년 5월 31일 영국 서머세트 노르스 카드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Moels(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan Lovel(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1337년 8월 30일 이전 영국에서 William de Botreaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 7월 19일 영국 도르세트 마훌에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Moels nasceu em 31 de maio de 1316, em North Cadbury, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Moels, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Lovel, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Botreaux antes 30 de agosto de 1337, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de julho de 1349, em Marnhull, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Moels родилась 31 мая 1316 г. в местности норт кадбури, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Moels было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Lovel, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Botreaux перед 30 августа 1337 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 июля 1349 г. в местности марнулл, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Moels nació el 31 de mayo de 1316, en North Cadbury, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Moels, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Lovel, tenía 11 años. Se casó con William de Botreaux antes de 30 de agosto de 1337, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de julio de 1349, en Marnhull, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años.
